title: Settings
groups: General · Image · Scan & Import · Network · Library · MetaTube

imageSettings.posterHint: Poster size, display mode, and missing image placeholder will be configurable in a future update
imageSettings.cacheHint: Image cache size and auto-cleanup rules will be configurable in a future update

scanImportSettings.scanHint: Scan strategy, file type filters, and exclude rules will be configurable in a future update
scanImportSettings.organizeHint: Auto-organize rules after scan (directory creation, file moving) will be configurable in a future update

networkSettings.playerPathPlaceholder: Leave empty to use system default player
networkSettings.useSystemDefault: Fall back to system default when no player specified

librarySettings.behaviorHint: Default scan paths, default sorting for new libraries will be configurable in a future update
